summary: Subscription & Billing System testing completed successfully. All 16 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI verified - Landing page pricing (KES 500/month, 14-day trial), Owner billing page with subscription status and invoice history, Admin invoice management with stats and invoice table.
passed_tests: GET /api/health - Health check ✅
POST /api/auth/login - Admin login (admin@caiwave.com) ✅
POST /api/auth/login - Owner login (owner@caiwave.com) ✅
GET /api/subscriptions/status - Requires authentication ✅
GET /api/subscriptions/status - Returns subscription status, trial days, hotspot count, monthly fee ✅
GET /api/invoices/ - Requires authentication ✅
GET /api/invoices/ - Returns owner's invoices with correct structure ✅
GET /api/invoices/current - Returns current invoice for owner ✅
GET /api/invoices/admin/all - Requires admin role ✅
GET /api/invoices/admin/all - Returns all invoices with stats (total, paid, trial, unpaid, overdue, revenue) ✅
POST /api/invoices/admin/mark-paid - Requires admin role ✅
POST /api/invoices/admin/suspend-overdue - Requires admin role ✅
POST /api/subscriptions/start-trial - Requires owner role ✅
POST /api/invoices/pay/{id} - Requires authentication ✅
Subscription price is KES 500 per hotspot per month ✅
Trial period is 14 days ✅
Landing page shows KES 500/month pricing with 14-day free trial ✅
Owner dashboard has Billing link in sidebar ✅
Owner billing page shows subscription status (Trial, 14 days left) ✅
Owner billing page shows monthly fee (KES 500) ✅
Owner billing page shows invoice history with Pay button ✅
Admin dashboard has Invoices link in sidebar ✅
Admin invoice management shows stats (Total, Trial, Unpaid, Overdue, Revenue) ✅
Admin invoice management shows invoice table with Mark Paid button ✅
Admin invoice management has Suspend Overdue button ✅
seed_data_creation: Owner has 1 hotspot with trial invoice (INV-202602-EE65, KES 500, Trial status, due 2/18/2026)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Subscription & Billing System fully tested. Owner has 14-day free trial with 1 hotspot. Monthly subscription is KES 500/hotspot. Invoice statuses: trial, unpaid, paid, overdue. Admin can mark invoices as paid and suspend overdue hotspots. M-Pesa STK Push payment is MOCKED when credentials not configured.

mocked_apis.M-Pesa STK Push: Simulated when MPESA credentials not configured in backend/.env
